description: On the Transia rooftop, Daisy faces Malick—now armed with exoskeleton-enhanced strength. The fight is brutal and one-sided until Charles intervenes, using his power to force Malick to experience a vision. Malick relents, escaping in a helicopter. Daisy and Charles share a final emotional moment as he dies, imploring Daisy to protect his daughter. Daisy receives a final, ominous vision of a space shuttle's destruction.

transcript.line: Power is intoxicating, isn't it? And he's right, you never really feel it until you take someone else's away from them.
Coulson, come in. Where are they?
I just had an awful thought. What if the death Daisy saw was her own?
Lincoln, do you read? All units, stop! Do not pursue! Lincoln, where are you?
Do not engage. I repeat, do not engage. Lincoln, we don't know what we're dealing with here. Pull out.
I was sure I could save you. But you were meant to save me.
I think we're supposed to hold hands now. Maybe some things are inevitable.
I made this for my daughter. I couldn't bear to leave them, but I had to protect Robin from this.
But now I'm afraid that she could grow up to be like me. So she will always need protection. I was hoping you could help.
Yes. I'll protect her, I promise. Always.
